recommendations.title: Ferry 2
recommendations.overview: After losing his drug empire, Ferry Bouman has found a measure of peace away from Brabant's criminal underworld — until his past catches up to him.

recommendations.title: A Fish Called Wanda
recommendations.overview: While a diamond advocate attempts to steal a collection of diamonds, troubles arise when he realises he’s not the only one after the collection.

recommendations.title: A Walk Among the Tombstones
recommendations.overview: Private investigator Matthew Scudder is hired by a drug kingpin to find out who kidnapped and murdered his wife.

recommendations.title: Mardaani
recommendations.overview: A Mumbai police officer's search for a missing teenage girl leads her to the depraved world of child trafficking. What follows is a cat-and-mouse game between the officer and a ruthless mafia kingpin.

recommendations.title: Super Fly
recommendations.overview: Priest, a New York City drug kingpin, devises a scheme to get out of the business and retire with a big payday, but his plans are complicated when a street dealer rats him out to the police.

recommendations.title: Wild Things: Diamonds in the Rough
recommendations.overview: Two young women will stop at nothing for one to gain a $4 million inheritance of two priceless diamonds, while two detectives try to thwart their plans, but find complications abound.

recommendations.title: Chor Nikal Ke Bhaga
recommendations.overview: A flight attendant and her boyfriend must steal a cache of diamonds to clear an old debt — but the plan spins into a mayhem when the plane gets hijacked.

recommendations.title: 7 Minutes
recommendations.overview: When three young criminals lose a stash of drugs, they end up owing money to a ruthless drug lord. With time running out, they plan a daring robbery to raise the cash to settle the debt.

recommendations.title: Outlaw
recommendations.overview: At the age of nine, Rebeca is sold by her grandmother to the bookseller who ran Rocinha. Disputed by bicheiros and drug dealers, the community is going through changes in power. Rebeca becomes the wife of the chief drug dealer and, with the death of

recommendations.title: Daredevil vs. Spider-Man
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Action, Crime, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Spider-Man and Daredevil team up to fight Kingpin.
